```python
good_states = set(metadata.get("good_states", ["010101", "101010"]))
good_count = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in good_states)
total_count = sum(counts.values())

assert total_count == shots, f"Counts should sum to shots: {total_count} != {shots}"

good_fraction = good_count / shots
bad_fraction = 1.0 - good_fraction
best_bad = max((counts.get(state, 0) for state in counts if state not in good_states), default=0) / shots

assert good_fraction >= 0.6, f"Too little probability on optimal alternating cuts: {good_fraction:.3f}"
assert good_fraction > bad_fraction, f"Non-optimal states dominate: good={good_fraction:.3f}, bad={bad_fraction:.3f}"
assert best_bad <= 0.2, f"Too much leakage into a single non-optimal state: {best_bad:.3f}"
```

```python
good_states = set(metadata.get("good_states", ["010101", "101010"]))
good_count = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in good_states)
total_count = sum(counts.values())
```

```python
)
```

```python
good_states = set(metadata.get("good_states", ["010101", "101010"]))
good_count = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in good_states)
total_count = sum(counts.values())

assert total_count == shots, f"Counts total {total_count} does not match shots {shots}"

good_fraction = good_count / shots
non_good_fraction = 1.0 - good_fraction
max_good_state = max((counts.get(state, 0) for state in good_states), default=0)
max_bad_state = max((c for s, c in counts.items() if s not in good_states), default=0)

assert good_fraction >= 0.55, f"Optimal alternating cuts not concentrated enough: {good_fraction:.3f}"
assert non_good_fraction <= 0.45, f"Too much probability leaked to non-optimal states: {non_good_fraction:.3f}"
assert max_good_state >= max_bad_state, (
    f"Best optimal state count {max_good_state} should be at least the best non-optimal count {max_bad_state}"
)
```

```python
good_states = set(metadata.get("good_states", ["010101", "101010"]))
good_count = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in good_states)
total_count = sum(counts.values())

assert total_count == shots, (total_count, shots)
assert good_count > 0, counts
assert good_count / shots >= 0.55, good_count / shots

best_non_good = 0
for state, c in counts.items():
    if state not in good_states and c > best_non_good:
        best_non_good = c

assert best_non_good <= good_count, (best_non_good, good_count)
assert (shots - good_count) / shots <= 0.45, (shots - good_count) / shots
```

```python
good_states = set(metadata.get("good_states", ["010101", "101010"]))
total_counts = sum(counts.values())
assert total_counts > 0
assert shots == total_counts

good_counts = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in good_states)
bad_counts = total_counts - good_counts

good_fraction = good_counts / total_counts
bad_fraction = bad_counts / total_counts

assert good_fraction >= 0.55, (good_fraction, counts)
assert bad_fraction <= 0.45, (bad_fraction, counts)

best_good = max(counts.get(state, 0) for state in good_states)
best_bad = max((c for s, c in counts.items() if s not in good_states), default=0)

assert best_good > 0
assert best_good >= best_bad, (best_good, best_bad, counts)
```

```python
good_states = set(metadata.get("good_states", ["010101", "101010"]))
good_count = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in good_states)
total_count = sum(counts.values())

assert total_count == shots, f"Counts sum {total_count} does not match shots {shots}"

good_fraction = good_count / shots
non_good_fraction = 1.0 - good_fraction

assert good_fraction >= 0.55, f"Optimal alternating cuts should dominate; got only {good_fraction:.3f} on {sorted(good_states)}"
assert non_good_fraction <= 0.45, f"Too much probability leaked to non-optimal states: {non_good_fraction:.3f}"

best_non_good = 0
for state, c in counts.items():
    if state not in good_states and c > best_non_good:
        best_non_good = c

assert good_count >= 2 * best_non_good, (
    f"Combined optimal-state weight {good_count} is not sufficiently larger than the top non-optimal count {best_non_good}"
)
```

```python
good_states = set(metadata.get("good_states", ["010101", "101010"]))
good_counts = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in good_states)
total_counts = sum(counts.values())

assert total_counts == shots, f"Counts total {total_counts} does not match shots {shots}"

good_fraction = good_counts / shots
max_bad_count = max((count for state, count in counts.items() if state not in good_states), default=0)
max_good_count = max((counts.get(state, 0) for state in good_states), default=0)

assert good_fraction >= 0.6, f"Optimal alternating cuts are not dominant enough: good_fraction={good_fraction:.3f}"
assert max_bad_count <= 0.35 * shots, f"Too much leakage to a non-optimal state: max_bad_count={max_bad_count}"
assert good_counts > sum(count for state, count in counts.items() if state not in good_states), (
    f"Non-optimal states collectively dominate: good_counts={good_counts}, "
    f"bad_counts={shots - good_counts}"
)
assert max_good_count >= max_bad_count, (
    f"A non-optimal bitstring is more frequent than either optimal cut: "
    f"max_good_count={max_good_count}, max_bad_count={max_bad_count}"
)
```

```python
good_states = set(metadata.get("good_states", ["010101", "101010"]))
total_counts = sum(counts.values())
assert total_counts > 0, "Counts must be nonempty."

good_counts = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in good_states)
bad_counts = total_counts - good_counts
good_fraction = good_counts / total_counts

assert good_fraction >= 0.6, f"Optimal alternating cuts should dominate the distribution, got {good_fraction:.3f}"
assert good_counts > bad_counts, f"Too much probability leaked to non-optimal states: good={good_counts}, bad={bad_counts}"

max_bad = 0
for state, c in counts.items():
    if state not in good_states and c > max_bad:
        max_bad = c

min_good = min(counts.get(state, 0) for state in good_states)
assert min_good > 0, f"Both optimal alternating states should appear, got counts {[counts.get(state, 0) for state in sorted(good_states)]}"
assert min_good >= max_bad, f"Each optimal state should be at least as likely as any non-optimal state: min_good={min_good}, max_bad={max_bad}"
```

```python
good_states = set(metadata.get("good_states", ["010101", "101010"]))
good_count = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in good_states)
total_count = sum(counts.values())

assert total_count == shots, f"Counts total {total_count} does not match shots {shots}"

good_fraction = good_count / shots
max_bad_count = max((c for s, c in counts.items() if s not in good_states), default=0)
max_good_count = max((counts.get(s, 0) for s in good_states), default=0)

assert good_fraction >= 0.6, f"Optimal alternating cuts have too little weight: {good_fraction:.3f}"
assert max_bad_count <= good_count, (
    f"Non-optimal states dominate too much: largest bad count {max_bad_count}, total good count {good_count}"
)
assert max_good_count >= 0.25 * shots, (
    f"No optimal alternating state is a clear mode: max good count {max_good_count} out of {shots}"
)
```
